hyperedges.label: Core database schema (User为中心的FK关系网)
Safety bulletin system (creation → distribution → read-receipt tracking)

hyperedges.description: JWT token lifecycle: register creates user, login issues tokens, refresh rotates tokens, logout invalidates
Bulletin lifecycle: admin creates bulletins, users see pending, acknowledge, admin reviews receipts
All routes gated by requireRole('admin') — admin-only operations
RBAC guard chain: getSessionUser extracts token payload, requireRole checks hierarchy, requirePermission checks matrix - all three form the authorization middleware layer
hyperedges.label: authorization_middleware

hyperedges.description: DTO validation layer: Zod schemas define input shapes for auth, directory, roster, and safety domains - all validated before service calls
hyperedges.label: dto_validation_layer

hyperedges.description: Audit trail pattern: bulletins and tickets both write to AuditLog after mutations, creating an immutable record of state changes
hyperedges.label: audit_trail_pattern

nodes.label: Two-step user approval (pending → active)
nodes.rationale: Registration creates a pending user; login is blocked until an admin approves. This prevents unauthorized access to the metro operations system.

nodes.label: RBAC system (super_admin / admin / operator)
nodes.rationale: Three-tier role hierarchy controls access: super_admin has full CRUD, admin has limited CRUD, operator has read-only plus ticket creation. Enforced on every protected Route Handler.

nodes.label: Audit logging on every mutation
nodes.rationale: Every create/update/delete writes an AuditLog row with before/after snapshots for traceability and compliance.

nodes.label: Mandatory safety bulletin read-receipt
nodes.rationale: Active bulletins block the UI via BulletinGuard until the user acknowledges them. ReadReceipt ensures compliance tracking.

nodes.label: Persian RTL localization
nodes.rationale: All user-facing text is Persian. Digits rendered in fa-IR via lib/fa.ts. Vazirmatn font. dayjs-jalali for Jalali calendar dates. RTL layout with logical CSS properties.

nodes.label: JWT auth with access + refresh tokens
nodes.rationale: jose library used for JWT. Access token passed in Authorization header. Refresh token for session renewal. Auth store persists tokens client-side.
nodes.norm_label: jwt auth with access + refresh tokens
